caption: A man with a distinctive tall, grey, textured hairstyle wears black headphones, round glasses, and a white shirt paired with a gold-colored bow tie. He sits in a studio setting facing a black microphone on a stand. In the background, a woman with bright pink hair wears a green dress. The room features white walls and a black backdrop with the text "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a green shield logo. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and red text on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains largely stationary, looking toward the right side of the frame, while the woman in the background remains still. There are no significant changes in position or action across the frames, maintaining a consistent shot of the podcast setup.
